hooks.command: input=$(cat); file_path=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d['tool_input'].get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); tool_name=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_name','Edit'))" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Edit'); PROJ='c:/Users/tiago.paixao/Documents/Python/Controledegastos'; git -C "$PROJ" add -A 2>/dev/null; if ! git -C "$PROJ" diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then msg="auto($tool_name): $(basename \"$file_path\")"; git -C "$PROJ" commit -m "$msg" 2>/dev/null && git -C "$PROJ" push origin main 2>/dev/null; fi || true
